description: Offshore platform management with predictive maintenance. Reduces helicopter callouts by 60%.
challenge: An unmanned offshore oil/gas platform or aquaculture system must operate autonomously between monthly maintenance visits. Network connectivity is expensive satellite bandwidth, and equipment failures require costly helicopter deployments.
response: NOAH Guardian monitors equipment vibration, temperature, and runtime hours to predict failures. Automatically throttles non-critical processes during equipment stress. Sends compressed alert packets via satellite. Self-healing attempts software recovery before human intervention.
result: Predictive maintenance reduces helicopter callouts by 60%. Complete operational history available for regulatory inspection.
